metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
BUY IN: 800m Run
Part A 3 Rounds
10 T2B
10 2xDB Hang Cleans (full clean)
10 Box Jumps
Part B 3 Rounds
10 V-ups
10m Single Arm DB OH Lunge per side
10 Box Jumps
Buy Out 40 Wall Balls

hypertrophy.reasoning: Deadlift and metcon hammer posterior chain and core; accessory work targets anterior/upper body for balance.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 4 at 70 percent. Metcon: Workout: 10 T2B, 10 2xDB Hang Cleans (full clean), 10 Box Jumps, 10 V-ups, 10m Single Arm DB OH Lunge per side. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, shoulders (lateral), biceps.
